name: Hyperliquid
description: On-chain perpetuals DEX — real-time market data, orderbooks, candles, funding rates, user positions, and trade history. Info endpoints are free.

credential_fields.name: wallet_address
credential_fields.label: Wallet_address
credential_fields.description: Your Ethereum wallet address for querying positions (optional for market data)

tools.name: get_meta
tools.description: Get metadata for all perpetual markets — symbols, max leverage, tick sizes, and contract specs.

tools.name: get_all_mids
tools.description: Get current mid prices for all perpetual markets.

tools.name: get_orderbook
tools.description: Get L2 order book for a perpetual market.

tools.name: get_candles
tools.description: Get OHLCV candle data for a perpetual market.

tools.name: get_user_state
tools.description: Get open positions, margin, and account value for a wallet address.

tools.name: get_funding
tools.description: Get current and historical funding rates for perpetual markets.
